user_message: Before my call with VanArsdel Ltd, draft the follow-up. We had a deep-dive last month -- need the follow-up.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-03 10:32 EST
Subject: Follow-up: renewal risk Review

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with renewal risk. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-16 12:30 EST
Subject: Re: renewal risk Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the renewal risk proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-13 09:23 EST
Subject: URGENT: renewal risk Issue at VanArsdel Ltd

Our team encountered some challenges with renewal risk. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

usability_anchors: Score 5: Complete, well-structured output matching the Email Context Pull-Through template with all required artifacts present and actionable
Score 3: Output covers main requirements but missing one or two secondary artifacts or lacking specificity
Score 1: Output is generic, missing key artifacts, or fails to address the specific request
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct renewal risk decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
